goal: Finish the idiomatic-RRv7 catalog data lifecycle: delete the now-dead S5 bespoke write-through, converge S4 archive/restore onto /ui-server actions via useFetcher, make SSE a pure revalidation trigger (revalidator.revalidate), and reconcile the superseded DISCUSS Decision #1. Realises ADR-034 §Amendment (2026-06-25).

delivery.note: One story branch for DC-119; the tasks below are the deliver session's internal plan and land as commits (no per-task branches/PRs).

out_of_scope: repointing the dead /api write ports (they are DELETED as dead code, not repointed)
retiring backendClient itself (that is DC-15 / S8 — this story blocks it)
new optimistic-UI framework (use RRv7 fetcher pending state only where warranted)

reconciliation.result: 1 contradiction, resolved by newer authority (ADR-034 amendment supersedes DISCUSS lean).
reconciliation.detail: DISCUSS open-questions.md §Non-questions + discuss/wave-decisions.md §Constraints assert 'reactive reads stay client-side'. ADR-034 §Amendment (2026-06-25) supersedes this. Back-propagation is Task D.

open_items: OI-1 (source-node rename): catalog.renameSource is also called for SOURCE nodes (local-only; no backend entity, no /ui-server target). Decide during delivery: keep a narrowed source-local rename isolated from the deleted MODEL write-through, or remove if source rename is not a supported operation. Default lean: keep a minimal source-local rename, prove it is decoupled from the removed model paths.

OI-2 (trigger granularity): default to revalidator.revalidate() (idiomatic, simplest); switch a scoped fetcher.load()/route revalidation only if measured latency for high-frequency row_* events proves perceptible (ADR-034 measured-fallback stance).

OI-3 (store surface): after write-through removal, re-evaluate whether the catalog still needs subscribe/getSnapshot/useSyncExternalStore or can shrink to loader-seeded reads. Investigate at the end of Task C.

tasks.title: Remove the now-dead S5 bespoke write-through (rename[model] / setModelName / toggleAudit)
tasks.driving_port: ui/ rename & audit-toggle UI (ModelDetail via useFetcher → /ui-server actions)
delete: ui/app/catalog/client.ts: renameSource (model kind path), setModelName, toggleAudit
ui/app/catalog/dataSources/source.ts: orphaned write-port type decls (e.g. toggleAuditEntry?)
tasks.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run ModelDetail audit-update dataset-update; grep proves zero bespoke refs

tasks.title: Converge S4 archive/restore onto /ui-server actions via useFetcher
tasks.driving_port: Cold Storage archive/restore UI (Upload/hooks.ts, ColdStorage/hooks.ts) → useFetcher → /ui-server/datasets/:id/archive|restore
change: Preserve the Cold Storage 'just-archived node stays visible in drawer' affordance via loader-derived state (was preserveCold on revalidateScoped)
tasks.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run dataset-archive dataset-restore ColdStorage Upload

tasks.title: Make SSE a pure revalidation trigger; remove the last client reflection machinery
tasks.driving_port: assistant chat SSE stream (ui/app/lib/chat-stream.ts CATALOG_MUTATING_EVENTS) + source-upload driver
change: ui/app/components/Chat/Chat.tsx: replace catalog.revalidateScope() with revalidator.revalidate() (or scoped fetcher.load per OI-2)
DELETE ui/app/catalog/client.ts: revalidateScope, revalidateScoped, captured-pid fences
Assert ui/app/routes/project-layout.tsx remains the single derivation point (toLineageGraph); shouldRevalidate covers the trigger
tasks.acceptance_test: ui/app/__acceptance__/ssr-ui-server-chat-wire.test.tsx (re-point: assert revalidator is triggered on transform_applied, NOT catalog.revalidateScope)

tasks.title: Reconcile the superseded DISCUSS Decision #1 to ADR-034's amendment
change: docs/feature/ssr-ui-server-gateway/discuss/idea-capture.md, discuss/wave-decisions.md, discuss/open-questions.md §Non-questions: annotate the 'reactive reads stay client-side' lean as superseded by ADR-034 §Amendment (2026-06-25)
Linear 'Catalog Behind BFF Gateway' project description bullet #1: point at ADR-034 amendment
tasks.verify: docs updated; grep confirms supersession note; project description references the amendment

notes: Walking skeleton is optional for a refactor (methodology: features only). The single acceptance-test seam is the existing ssr-ui-server-chat-wire.test.tsx, re-pointed in Task C. Error-path coverage target >=40%: assert failed archive/restore (non-2xx) surfaces error with no phantom client state and no /login redirect (AC-B3), and cross-project switch re-scopes correctly (AC-C3).
